---
title: "Tech Stack"
---

## Programming Languages

- **Python** - Primary language for data science and ML projects
- **R** - Statistical analysis and visualization
- **SQL** - Database queries and data manipulation

## Data & ML Tools

- **Pandas** - Data manipulation and analysis
- **Polars** - High-performance dataframes
- **Scikit-learn** - Machine learning algorithms
- **CausalML** - Causal inference
- **EconML** - Econometric ML methods
- **MLflow** - ML experiment tracking
- **Kedro** - Data pipeline framework

## LLM & NLP

- **OpenAI GPT** - Large language models
- **SpaCy** - NLP toolkit
- **Gazpacho** - Web scraping

## Platforms & Infrastructure

- **Neo4j** - Graph databases
- **Quarto** - This website!

## Visualization

- Add your visualization tools here (Plotly, Matplotlib, Seaborn, etc.)

Feel free to expand this page with more details about each technology!
